rulings.Case Title: GREGORY ROSE VS. PAUL WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 28, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC.'s DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: sustained on part and overruled in part. Demurer to the first cause of action (fraudulent misrepresentation) is sustained with leave to amend to allege with requisite specificity causation i.e. how defendant's failure to disclose the illegality of the unit/misrepresentation of legality caused "rent damages, rent differential damages, moving expenses, and emotional distress." Beckwith v. Dahl (2012) 205 Cal.App.4th 1039. Demurer to the second cause of action (negligent misrepresentation) is sustained without leave to amend. "An 'implied' assertion or representation is not enough" to support a cause of action for negligent misrepresentation. Diediker v. Peelle Fin. Corp., 60 Cal. App. 4th 288, 297-98. Demurrer to the 5th-8th causes of action is overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges all elements of these causes of action and standing (FAC, paragraph 13). = (501/REQ - Late Tentative)

rulings.Case Title: GREGORY ROSE VS. PAUL WONG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 28, 2014, Line 4: DEFENDANT GAETANI REAL ESTATE, INC.'s MOTION TO STRIKE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT: granted in part and denied in part. Motion is granted as to the punitive damages allegations with leave to amend to allege facts re: malice, oppression or fraud. Motion is denied as to the allegations regarding SFRO 37.9 and request for attorney's fees. Defendant failed to show that these allegations are irrelevant, improper or false. = (501/REQ - Late Tentative)

rulings.Case Title: NICHOLAS PANOUTSOPOULOS et al VS. THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Special Motion To Strike (Slapp)
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 28, 2014, Line 6: DEFENDANTS THE KARSANT FAMILY LIMITED PARTNERSHIP and PETER KARSANT's Special Motion To Strike (Slapp): GRANTED as to the first and second causes of action. These claims arise out of protected activity and Plaintiff is barred from prevailing on the merits by CC 47(b) privilege. Navarro v. IHOP (2005) 134 Cal.App.4th 834.The Court declines Plaintiff' invitation to rule contrary to existing authority. = (501/REQ - Late Tentative)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN STONE INVESTMENT LLC VS. GABRIEL XIANG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, May 28, 2014, Line 10. Plaintiff's Motion For Summary Judgment DENIED. Plaintiff fails to show that the Note has been assigned to foreclosing beneficiary of the Deed of Trust. "[a]n assignment of the note carries the mortgage with it, while an assignment of the latter alone is a nullity." Carpenter v. Longan (1871) 83 U.S. 271. Plaintiff's argument that " 'for value' assignment of the DOT creates a presumption by implication that any assignment of the DOT necessarily included the assignment of the Note, without the necessity for a specific reference that the Note was also being assigned" is not supported by any authority and is contrary to Carpenter v. Longan. Also, Apostal v. CitiMortgage (2013) 2013 WL 6328256 did no address the failure to assign the Note together with the DOT. = (501/REQ) - (LATE TENTATIVE)
